repo_prior_art.cite: none; doc/API.md §1 panel entries are linear/FWL history-cell results, not PPML pseudo-true projections

published_prior_art.cite: White1982MisspecifiedML supplies the pseudo-true score framework; MoreauKastler2025PTT eqs. (3.4)–(3.6) and Appendix B1 give the same 2×3 PPML system from which the displayed family follows by substitution.

MoreauKastler2025PTT eq. (3.6) already yields the stated 2×3 derivative by differentiation, while the finite-panel weighted-FWL derivative is a routine implicit-score/FWL generalization not stated there.

repo_prior_art.cite: none; the panel catalogue contains no PPML global all-positive-effect sign frontier

published_prior_art.cite: MoreauKastler2025PTT §3.1 and eq. (3.6) establish a two-unit symptom, but do not characterize the primitive timing-and-baseline region for global sign reversal.

MoreauKastler2025PTT eq. (3.14) defines the same imputation ratio and recommends a unit bootstrap; Wooldridge2023NonlinearDiD derives pooled canonical-link QMLE/imputation equivalence and standard-error machinery, so this sandwich is a direct delta-method composition.

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The pseudo-true score is standard White QMLE and MoreauKastler2025PTT eqs. (3.4)–(3.6) already provide the 2×3 PPML formula from which the proposed closed-form family follows.

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 3
novelty_flags.one_line: MoreauKastler2025PTT eq. (3.14) supplies the proposed PTT ratio, and Wooldridge2023NonlinearDiD already supplies the fixed-T canonical-link pooled-QMLE and standard-error route; the displayed IF is routine delta-method bookkeeping.

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 1 gap
novelty_flags.one_line: The claim that MoreauKastler2025PTT gives only a numerical two-unit/three-period illustration is inaccurate: its eqs. (3.4)–(3.6) and Appendix B1 derive an analytic PPML formula and likelihood system.

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 3 / related work
novelty_flags.one_line: NagengastYotov2025 is a closer omitted fully interacted staggered-PPML comparator; MoreauKastler2025 itself discusses its PPML aggregation of cohort-time semi-elasticities.

novelty_flags.label: MoreauKastler2025PTT comparator promise
novelty_flags.one_line: The promise table calls Theorem 2 a strict tightening, but no statement is phrased as a formal strict extension of MoreauKastler2025PTT’s eq. (3.6); state that comparison explicitly or downgrade it to informed-by.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 3
soundness_flags.one_line: The iid assumptions specify only the observed conditional mean; they never impose b_gt=exp(eta_g+gamma_t^P) and m_gt=b_gt exp(delta_gt^P), so Rhat_N is not shown to target the potential-outcome PTT(P) that the theorem claims.

soundness_flags.label: tldr / Theorem 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The tldr says the positive-effect witness has derivative minus one half, whereas Theorem 2 gives -r/(r+1), which is strictly below -1/2 because epsilon>0 implies r>1.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Make the primitive global sign-reversal frontier the headline, name its sign-region object, and give a T=4 nondegenerate worked instance that separates it from MoreauKastler2025PTT’s 2×3 formula.

Add explicit iid causal baseline and proportional-effect assumptions linking b_gt and delta_gt^P to the observed interacted PPML mean, then rederive the PTT influence function under those assumptions.
Add NagengastYotov2025 and replace the claimed strict tightening of MoreauKastler2025PTT with an explicit theorem-level comparison to its eq. (3.6).

recommended_next_step: Continue revision: retain the global PPML sign-frontier question as the possible field-level kernel, but remove or demote the published/routine support claims and repair the iid causal target.
